findings.message: The condition for the source-index-stage1 job is changed from always running (empty string) to only running on the main branch. This will prevent source indexing from running on non-main branches, which may be intentional but could break CI workflows that depend on source indexing for all branches.
findings.suggestion: If source indexing is needed for all branches, revert the condition to empty string. Otherwise, ensure that all dependent pipelines are aware of this change.

findings.message: The build image is changed from '1es-mariner-2' to '1es-azurelinux-3'. This may introduce breaking changes if the new image has different tooling, dependencies, or environment variables. The patch does not show any corresponding adjustments to the build steps or scripts.
findings.suggestion: Verify that the new image '1es-azurelinux-3' is compatible with all build steps and scripts used in this job. Update any environment-specific commands or paths if necessary.

needs_human_review.message: Adding '-UseBasicParsing' to Invoke-WebRequest may change the response object type (e.g., no HtmlWebResponseObject), which could break downstream code that expects the default parsing behavior.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Ensure that no code downstream relies on the Internet Explorer engine's HTML parsing (e.g., accessing .Links, .Images, or .Forms). If not needed, the change is safe.

needs_human_review.message: Adding '-UseBasicParsing' to Invoke-WebRequest may change the response object type, potentially breaking code that expects the default IE-driven parsing.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Confirm that no downstream code depends on the default HTML parsing features. If not, the change is safe.

needs_human_review.message: Adding '-UseBasicParsing' to Invoke-WebRequest may change the response object type, potentially breaking code that expects the default IE-driven parsing.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Ensure that no downstream code relies on the default HTML parsing. If not, the change is safe.

needs_human_review.message: The patch changes the internal runtime download source URL from 'https://dotnetbuilds.blob.core.windows.net/internal' to 'https://ci.dot.net/internal' and adds a new '--runtimesourcefeed' argument. This alters the trust boundary for runtime artifact downloads, potentially exposing the build to a different internal endpoint without evidence of equivalent security controls.
needs_human_review.suggestion: Verify that the new URL 'https://ci.dot.net/internal' is an authorized internal feed with equivalent or stronger access controls and that the added '--runtimesourcefeed' argument does not bypass existing authentication or introduce a man-in-the-middle risk.

discarded.message: The patch changes the internal runtime download feed URL from 'https://dotnetbuilds.blob.core.windows.net/internal' to 'https://ci.dot.net/internal' and adds a new '--runtimesourcefeed' argument. If the new URL or argument format is incorrect or not supported by the build tooling, the download may fail silently or use an unintended source.
discarded.suggestion: Verify that 'https://ci.dot.net/internal' is the correct and accessible internal feed URL, and that the '--runtimesourcefeed' argument is properly handled by the build scripts.

discarded.message: Test method 'CanSendAndReceiveUserMessagesFromMultipleConnectionsWithSameUser' is quarantined due to a known issue, but the patch does not include any fix or mitigation for the underlying flakiness.
discarded.suggestion: Consider adding a retry mechanism or investigating the root cause of the flakiness referenced in the issue before quarantining.

lines.content: <!-- Intermediate is necessary for source build. -->
$ProgressPreference = 'SilentlyContinue' # Don't display the console progress UI - it's a huge perf hit
$"Expected log message to match one of the CSP error patterns: {ParseErrorMessageRegexOld} or {ParseErrorMessageRegexNew}. Actual: {logs[0].Message}");
[GeneratedRegex(@"security - Refused to frame 'http://\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+:\d+/' because an ancestor violates the following Content Security Policy directive: ""frame-ancestors 'none'"".")]
private static partial Regex ParseErrorMessageRegexOld { get; }
[GeneratedRegex(@"security - Framing 'http://\d+\.\d+\.\d+\.\d+:\d+/' violates the following Content Security Policy directive: ""frame-ancestors 'none'"".")]
private static partial Regex ParseErrorMessageRegexNew { get; }
public async Task CanSendAndReceiveUserMessagesFromMultipleConnectionsWithSameUser(HttpTransportType transportType, string protocolName)
public async Task CanSendAndReceiveUserMessagesUserNameWithPatternIsTreatedAsLiteral(HttpTransportType transportType, string protocolName)
public override async Task<WebSocketReceiveResult> ReceiveAsync(ArraySegment<byte> buffer, CancellationToken cancellationToken)
